title: BAR MANAGEMENT TRAINEE
description:
TSH Corporation Limited specializes in offering and distributing the epitome of premium whiskies, cocktails, and spirits. Our portfolio includes eight unique concepts: Quaich Bar Collector, Quaich Bar Avant-garde, Quaich Bar Wanderlust, The Other Room, Signature Reserve, Capitol Cigar & Whisky Lounge, The Whisky Store, and Whisky Journey.


Benefits:

  • Career progression
  • Overseas training opportunities
  • Being part of company's large scale events
  • Staff benefits (Annual Leave, Medical, Dental, etc. )

Requirements:

  • Ability to adapt and thrive in a dynamic and fast paced environment.
  • Possess strong interpersonal and communications skills.
  • Able to work independently and in team.
  • Able to commit on weekends and Public Holidays.
  • No experience needed as training will be provided.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Proactive attention to detail that motivates double-checking orders and making records of information when necessary
  • Ability to work smoothly with a team, synchronizes processes with others to fulfill orders as quickly as possible
  • Must be efficient and energetic, multitasking to complete multiple orders or switching between different types of activities
  • Helping out in the pantry (Food preparation which includes cleaning duties)
  • Take customer orders, guiding them with selections and making recommendations if requested
  • Any other duties may be assigned from time to time

If you're a FUN and OUTGOING individual that fits all the above criteria, do not hesitate to apply! Come join our big family today!


We regret to inform that only shortlisted applicants will be contacted

skills.skill: Work in a Fast Paced Environment

postedCompany.description:
The Whisky Store began in 2005 as a humble retail kiosk in Tanglin Mall run by escapees from the corporate world, Khoon Hui and Joyce. At that time, the Singaporean market lacked a dedicated whisky bar and through the dedicated pursuit of their passion for fine whisky, Khoon and Joyce opened a whisky bar one year later. Born in 2007, Quaich Bar was the first whisky concept bar in Singapore.


Today, The Whisky Store is much more than a kiosk. The group provides retail and wholesale of a very wide range of whiskies, many of which they hold in exclusive agency for in Singapore. These close relationships allow The Whisky Store to gain access to exclusive bottlings and casks that cannot be found anywhere else. Quaich Bar is still where it began in 2007, but now has a sister bar Quaich Bar South Beach. And in 2021, a new bar and restaurant called Signature Reserve was opened.
postedCompany.name: QUAICH PTE. LTD.
